creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
Hi,

> The KDE1.0-port does not compile without modifications because the
> qt-includes changed location to /usr/local/includes/qt.

> Just try to install KDE on a fresh installed FreeBSD 2.2.7 stable
> after 'cvsuping' the ports ...

You need to upgrade your bsd.port.mk - cvsup the stable source and get the
new one and put it /usr/share/mk/.

Brett
******************************************************************

 as he comes into view, passes by, and disappears."
